## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Issues

Use closing keywords, for example:
- Closes #123
- Fixes #456

## Validation

- [ ] Local checks pass
- [ ] Acceptance criteria from linked issue are met
- [ ] Any user-facing changes are documented

## Scope Check

- [ ] This PR only addresses the linked issue scope
- [ ] Out-of-scope work has been split into follow-up issues
